title: Karapuranathar Temple
tagline: Karapuranathar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Karapuranathar (Tamil: கரபுரநாதர்) temple is an ancient temple in Salem District of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: Karapuranathar (Tamil: கரபுரநாதர்) temple is an ancient temple in Salem District of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The main deity is Shiva in lingasorubam. The temple is located near the west bank of Thirumanimutharu river at Uthamacholapuram. The lingam is suyambu.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Vinayaka Mission's Research Foundation
topPlaces.description: Vinayaka Mission's Research Foundation is a UGC, Government of India recognized private deemed-to-be-university located in Salem, Tamil Nadu, India. In 2015, the university was accredited by National Assessment and Accreditation Council.

topPlaces.name: Kondalampatti
topPlaces.description: Kondalampatti is a Zonal Region in Salem City consisting of 15 wards in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. As of 2022 Thiru.

topPlaces.name: Neikarappatti
topPlaces.description: Neikarappatti is a census town in Salem district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Veerapandi, Salem
topPlaces.description: Veerapandi is a suburb of Salem, Tamil Nadu, India, 14 km from the old bus stand, 13 km from the new bus stand and 14 km from Salem Junction. Today it has the main college area in Salem.

topPlaces.name: Kanjamalai
topPlaces.description: Kanjamalai is a hill located 14 km west of Salem, in Salem District of Tamil Nadu, India. The estimated terrain elevation above sea level is about 1643 meter.

topPlaces.name: Veerapandi block
topPlaces.description: Veerapandi block is a revenue block of Salem district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. This revenue block consist of 25 panchayat villages.

topPlaces.name: Salem, Tamil Nadu
topPlaces.description: Salem (pronounced [seːlam] ) is a city in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located on the banks of the Thirumanimutharu River and surrounded by the Eastern Ghats.

topPlaces.name: Bharat Ratna Dr. M.G.R. Central Bus Stand
topPlaces.description: Bharat Ratna Dr. M.G.R. Central Bus Stand, commonly known as Salem Central Bus Stand, is one of the bus terminus of Salem other being the Town Bus Terminus Salem City.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Karapuranathar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Karapuranathar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Karapuranathar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (115 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (111 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Karapuranathar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Karapuranathar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Karapuranathar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Karapuranathar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Karapuranathar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vinayaka Mission's Research Foundation, Kondalampatti, Neikarappatti, Veerapandi, Salem, Kanjamalai.
